title: Star Cruiser (disambiguation)
content:
'''Star Cruiser''' might refer to several different subjects:

'''Canon:'''
*[[Star Cruiser]]: A type of [[capital ship]] that came in many varieties but mostly referring to the ships made by the [[Mon Calamari]].
'''Legends:'''
*[[Star Cruiser/Legends|Star Cruiser]]: A general term for a broad category of spacegoing [[Capital ship/Legends|capital ships]].
*[[Mon Calamari Star Cruiser/Legends|Mon Calamari Star Cruiser]]: a designation for large spaceships produced by the [[Mon Calamari/Legends|Mon Calamari]].
*[[Star Cruiser (Galactic Empire)]]: Several spaceships used by the Galactic Empire. A model of [[air cruiser]] and a [[Super Star Destroyer/Legends|Super Star Destroyer]].

{{Disambig}}
